name: Iso11783IL_OPOnAuxiliaryInput
title: Iso11783IL_OPOnAuxiliaryInput
syntax: void Iso11783IL_OPOnAuxiliaryInput( dword objectID, dword value1, dword value2 );
description: The function is called by the node layer, if an Auxiliary Input Status is received and a Auxiliary Function in the object pool is assigned.

parameters.name: objectID
parameters.description: Object identifier of the auxiliary function object
